source.ref: flexi - bouncing balls [double mindblob neon mix]

display.name: Flexi - bouncing balls (neon)
display.author: Flexi
display.blurb: Neon orbs ricochet through space, syncing their tempo to the bass.

annotation.technical_notes: A complex per-pixel warp shader generates a fluid, swirling advection field that mimics organic cellular division. High-frequency neon boundaries are composited via sampler_main with a low decay rate, preserving the painterly, liquid-like trails. The color palette undergoes a continuous hue cycle, shifting from vivid greens and blues to deep magentas and fiery oranges in response to the audio's frequency bands.
